ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot gently receiving an incoming message or item, represented by the inbox_tray emoji.  The movement should be smooth and welcoming, suggesting the robot is ready to accept the incoming information. The sequence will involve both arms moving in a coordinated manner to create a receptive gesture. Frame 1 will show both arms slightly raised and angled inwards, palms facing upwards as if cupping an incoming object. Frame 2 will show the arms moving slightly closer together, maintaining the upward-facing palms, emphasizing the receptive gesture. Frame 3 will show the arms lowering slightly, as if the object has been received, and the palms remain upward-facing. Frame 4 will show the arms returning to a neutral position at the sides, indicating the action is complete. This gradual and welcoming movement conveys the 'receiving' aspect of the inbox_tray emoji effectively.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, palms open to receive
arms move closer, cradling the incoming item
arms lower gently, the item is now held
arms return to rest, the message is received
